scripts.install:all: bun install --cwd backend && bun install --cwd frontend
scripts.build: bun run build:backend && bun run build:frontend
scripts.deploy: bun run deploy:backend && bun run deploy:frontend
scripts.deploy:with-migrate: bun run migrate && bun run deploy
scripts.migrate:core: bun run --cwd backend src/db/migrate-robust.ts && bun run --cwd backend src/db/migrate-event-pricing.ts
scripts.migrate:all: bun run migrate:core && bun run migrate:legacy
scripts.lint: bun run lint:backend && bun run lint:frontend
scripts.test: bun run test:backend && bun run test:frontend
scripts.backup: bun run backup:storage && bun run backup:db
